methods.name: modelmetricsdk.singleton_manager.SingletonManager.get_instance
documentation: This function creates SingletonManager instance if not present and return it.

methods.name: modelmetricsdk.singleton_manager.SingletonManager.logger
documentation: This function returns logger.

methods.name: modelmetricsdk.singleton_manager.SingletonManager.config
documentation: This functions returns sdk configuration in dictionary.

This class is used to get sdk configuration and logger.
Simplified Singleton implementation.
Thread safety not considered, only reading from the instance after creation.

classes.name: modelmetricsdk.model_metrics_sdk.ModelMetricsSdk

methods.name: modelmetricsdk.model_metrics_sdk.ModelMetricsSdk.get_aws_key
documentation: This function would retrieve aws_secret_access_key from kubernetes secrets

methods.name: modelmetricsdk.model_metrics_sdk.ModelMetricsSdk.upload_model
documentation:
This function upload folder/file which is at model_path in bucket with version prefix
as zip file. if model_under_version_folder is True then folder/file which is at model_path
is put under version folder as zip file otherwise is put directly as zip file.
args:
    model_path: location of file which will be uploaded
    trainingjob_name: bucket name
    version: version
    model_under_version_folder: boolean flag indicating where folder/file which is at
                                model_path is put under version folder or not as zip file
return value:
    None

methods.name: modelmetricsdk.model_metrics_sdk.ModelMetricsSdk.upload_metrics
documentation:
This function upload dictionary represting metrics in bucket with version prefix.
args:
    metrics: dictionary represting metrics
    model_name: bucket name
    model_version: version
    artifact_version : path of model
return value:
    None

methods.name: modelmetricsdk.model_metrics_sdk.ModelMetricsSdk.get_metrics
documentation:
This function returns dictionary represting metrics in bucket with version prefix.
args:
    trainingjob_name: bucket name
    version: version
return value:
    dictionary represting metrics

methods.name: modelmetricsdk.model_metrics_sdk.ModelMetricsSdk.get_model_zip
documentation:
This function returns model zip file in memory from bucket whose prefix is version
args:
    trainingjob_name: bucket name
    version: version
return value:
    zip file in memory

methods.name: modelmetricsdk.model_metrics_sdk.ModelMetricsSdk.get_model
documentation:
This function download model from bucket whose prefix is version at download_path
args:
    trainingjob_name: bucket name
    version: version
    download_path: download path
return value:
    None

methods.name: modelmetricsdk.model_metrics_sdk.ModelMetricsSdk.delete_model_metric
documentation:
This functions return True if all objects with version prefix are deleted otherwise
it returns False
args:
    trainingjob_name: bucket_name
    version: version
return value:
    True: if all objectss with version prefix are deleted
    False: if all object with version prefix are not deleted

methods.name: modelmetricsdk.model_metrics_sdk.ModelMetricsSdk.check_object
documentation:
This function checks object is present in bucket with versions prefix.
args:
    trainingjob_name: bucket name
    version: version
    file_name: object which we want to check
return value:
    True: if object is present in bucket with version prefix.
    False: if object is not present in bucket with version prefix.

methods.name: modelmetricsdk.model_metrics_sdk.ModelMetricsSdk.is_bucket_present
documentation:
This function checks given bucket is present or not.
args:
    trainingjob_name: bucket name
return value:
    True: if bucket is present
    False: if bucket is not present
This class is used for working with object database.
